events.title: Crisis on Infinite Earths
events.description: DC's foundational 1985 to 1986 continuity reset event, with a clean core path and optional companion issues.

events.title: Infinite Crisis
events.description: DC's 2005 to 2006 multiseries event, seeded with a compact core path and a broader Countdown companion route.

events.title: Civil War
events.description: Marvel's registration-era crossover with a compact main-event path and a Spider-Man focused companion route.

events.title: House of M
events.description: Marvel's Wanda Maximoff reality-warping event, seeded with a clean core route and a character-focused companion path.

reading_paths.title: Crisis on Infinite Earths: Expanded Companion Path

entries.note: A strong Superman-family companion around the early event issues.
